requirement_topic.en: Radio / Telecom Terminal Equipment Type Approval (UzACI Conformity Certificate)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电/电信终端设备型号核准（UzACI合格证书）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電/電信終端設備型號核准（UzACI合格證書）

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment — including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular-enabled devices — must obtain a UzACI conformity certificate (type approval) from the Agency for Communications and Information (under the Ministry of Digital Technologies) before import or sale in Uzbekistan. Testing must be conducted by an accredited laboratory against applicable O'z DSt standards or accepted ITU/GOST-derived standards. The certificate covers radio spectrum use, interference parameters, and minimum technical performance. Neither the Russian EAC mark nor the Chinese SRRC approval substitutes for this requirement.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备——包括Wi-Fi、蓝牙及蜂窝设备——在进口或于乌兹别克斯坦销售前，须从信息通信局（隶属数字技术部）取得UzACI合格证书（型号核准）。测试须由认可实验室依适用O'z DSt标准或已接受的ITU/GOST衍生标准进行，证书涵盖无线电频谱使用、干扰参数及最低技术性能。俄罗斯EAC标志及中国SRRC核准均不可替代此要求。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端設備——包括Wi-Fi、藍牙及蜂巢設備——在進口或於烏茲別克斯坦銷售前，須從信息通訊局（隸屬數字技術部）取得UzACI合格證書（型號核准）。測試須由認可實驗室依適用O'z DSt標準或已接受的ITU/GOST衍生標準進行，證書涵蓋無線電頻譜使用、干擾參數及最低技術性能。俄羅斯EAC標誌及中國SRRC核准均不可取代此要求。

standards_or_laws: Uzbekistan Law on Telecommunications (2014, as amended)
UzACI Conformity Assessment Procedures for Radio and Telecom Terminal Equipment

summary.en: In China, intentional radio transmitters require MIIT/SRRC radio type approval. Telecom terminal equipment requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). CCC certification covers electrical and RF safety for applicable product categories. These Chinese approvals are independent of and not mutually recognised with UzACI.
summary.zh: 在中国，有意辐射发射装置须取得工业和信息化部/无线电委员会（MIIT/SRRC）无线电型号核准；电信终端设备须取得工信部网络进网许可证（NAL）；CCC认证涵盖适用类别产品的电气及射频安全。上述中国核准与UzACI相互独立，不存在互认。
summary.zht: 在中國，有意輻射發射裝置須取得工業和信息化部/無線電委員會（MIIT/SRRC）無線電型號核准；電信終端設備須取得工信部網絡進網許可證（NAL）；CCC認證涵蓋適用類別產品的電氣及射頻安全。上述中國核准與UzACI相互獨立，不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for applicable RF product categories

gap.en: Full gap. UzACI conformity certificate is mandatory and must be obtained separately. SRRC, CCC, and Russian EAC marks have no legal standing in Uzbekistan. A new conformity assessment against UzACI/O'z DSt requirements — including local or mutually accepted laboratory testing — is required for each product model.
gap.zh: 完全差距。UzACI合格证书为强制要求，须另行取得。SRRC、CCC及俄罗斯EAC标志在乌兹别克斯坦不具法律效力，须针对每个产品型号依UzACI/O'z DSt要求（含当地或互认实验室测试）重新进行合格评定。
gap.zht: 完全差距。UzACI合格證書為強制要求，須另行取得。SRRC、CCC及俄羅斯EAC標誌在烏茲別克斯坦不具法律效力，須針對每個產品型號依UzACI/O'z DSt要求（含當地或互認實驗室測試）重新進行合格評定。

source.publisher: Ministry of Digital Technologies of the Republic of Uzbekistan (UzACI)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UzACI conformity certificate is a mandatory prerequisite for import and sale of all radio and telecom terminal equipment in Uzbekistan. Chinese SRRC, CCC, and Russian EAC approvals are not accepted. A separate UzACI conformity assessment — including laboratory testing to O'z DSt or accepted GOST/ITU standards — must be completed before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UzACI合格证书是在乌兹别克斯坦进口和销售所有无线电及电信终端设备的强制性前提条件。中国SRRC、CCC及俄罗斯EAC核准均不被接受。须在进入市场前完成单独的UzACI合格评定（含依O'z DSt或公认GOST/ITU标准进行的实验室测试）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UzACI合格證書是在烏茲別克斯坦進口和銷售所有無線電及電信終端設備的強制性前提條件。中國SRRC、CCC及俄羅斯EAC核准均不被接受。須在進入市場前完成單獨的UzACI合格評定（含依O'z DSt或公認GOST/ITU標準進行的實驗室測試）。
